metric_note: This is DETECTION LATENCY (first true alarm minus onset), not a physical lead time. With a 30-min poll cadence the smallest observable latency is one poll, so the value is cadence-bounded, not a property of the agent alone; a cadence/seed sweep is future work.

headline.reading: Requiring HIGH confidence cuts pre-onset false alarms sharply while preserving detection, because true post-onset alarms are almost all high-confidence and false pre-onset ones are mostly low/med. This is a simple, honest fix for the monitor's precision problem.
